cases.title: TS-24: Missing GPS coordinates on check-in submit returns GpsDisabled before radius check
preconditions: Active session with valid room GPS and enrolled authenticated Student
Valid unexpired QrToken from GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current
Request body omits latitude and longitude (client GPS unavailable per BR-12)
TestClock within attendance window
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId } only (no latitude/longitude) using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response outcome GpsDisabled and errorCode GpsDisabled
Assert message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh per AC-08c
Query attendance_records and assert status remains Pending
Verify check-in pipeline short-circuits at step 11 before BR-02 radius evaluation per validation-rules §5.1
cases.expected: BR-12 rejects check-in when client cannot supply geolocation; outcome GpsDisabled; no Present attendance; radius check not reached

cases.title: TS-24 variant: null latitude/longitude on check-in submit returns GpsDisabled
preconditions: Active session with valid room GPS and enrolled authenticated Student
Valid unexpired QrToken
Request body sends latitude: null and longitude: null (GPS disabled on device)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId, latitude: null, longitude: null } using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400 outcome GpsDisabled and errorCode GpsDisabled
Assert Vietnamese message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh
Query check_in_attempts and assert outcome GpsDisabled logged
Assert QrToken status remains Valid (not Consumed)
cases.expected: BR-12 treats null coordinates as GPS unavailable; GpsDisabled outcome; token not consumed

cases.title: CheckInService.submit rejects missing coordinates with GpsDisabled at module boundary
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrollment, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
CheckInService wired per domain model §5.2 check-in transaction
CheckInRequest payload with tokenId but no latitude/longitude fields
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submit with tokenId only (coordinates absent)
Assert returned outcome GpsDisabled without throwing unhandled exception
Query check_in_attempts and assert row inserted with outcome GpsDisabled
Query attendance_records and assert status remains Pending
Assert GeoVerificationService.verifyLocation was not invoked (no distance_meters computed)
cases.expected: BR-12 enforced inside CheckInService at pipeline step 11; module rejects before GeoVerificationService radius evaluation

cases.title: GpsDisabled attempt persists CheckInAttempt without consuming QrToken or marking Present
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrolled student, Valid QrToken status Valid
Pending attendance_records row for student and session
CheckInService.submit callable with missing GPS payload
steps: Record beforeState: QrToken status Valid, attendance Pending
Invoke CheckInService.submit without coordinates
Query check_in_attempts and assert outcome GpsDisabled with attempted_at set
Query qr_tokens and assert afterState status remains Valid (not Consumed)
Query attendance_records and assert afterState remains Pending
cases.expected: BR-12 failure logs attempt for audit but does not consume token or create Present attendance per rule interaction matrix step 6

cases.title: GpsDisabled rejection leaves Attendance Pending allowing retry after GPS enabled
preconditions: Pending attendance_records row in PostgreSQL for enrolled student and Active session
Valid QrToken; CheckInService.submit callable
In-radius coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200) available for retry fixture
steps: Record beforeState Attendance status Pending
Invoke CheckInService.submit with tokenId only (no coordinates)
Assert CheckInAttempt outcome GpsDisabled inserted
Query attendance_records and assert afterState remains Pending
Invoke CheckInService.submit again with same or fresh token and valid in-radius coordinates
Assert afterState Present on successful retry
cases.expected: beforeState Pending; afterState Pending on GpsDisabled per SM-04; student may retry when GPS becomes available

cases.title: POST /check-in without coordinates returns 400 GpsDisabled envelope
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie set
Active session with Valid QrToken
Request body missing latitude and longitude (simulates client GPS disabled)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId } only using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response outcome GpsDisabled and errorCode GpsDisabled
Assert message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh per API design §6.3
cases.expected: HTTP 400 GpsDisabled canonical failure envelope per validation-rules §4 BR-12 mapping and error-handling §4

cases.title: POST /check-in with gpsAvailable false flag returns 400 GpsDisabled when client signals denial
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session
Active session with Valid QrToken
API accepts optional client GPS availability flag per check-in DTO extension
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId, gpsAvailable: false } (no coordinates)
Assert HTTP status 400 outcome GpsDisabled
Assert errorCode GpsDisabled in response envelope
Contrast: same request with gpsAvailable true and valid coordinates returns 200 Success
cases.expected: BR-12 server-side guard rejects when client explicitly signals geolocation unavailable before radius check

cases.title: GpsDisabled short-circuits at pipeline step 11 before BR-02 OutOfRadius at step 13
preconditions: Active session with room GPS (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Authenticated enrolled Student with Pending attendance and Valid QrToken
Request omits coordinates (would be out-of-radius if submitted with 10.764122, 106.660172)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId only (no coordinates)
Assert outcome GpsDisabled (not OutOfRadius)
Query check_in_attempts and assert outcome GpsDisabled with distance_meters NULL
Verify pipeline order per validation-rules §5.1 steps 11 (BR-12) before 13 (BR-02) and business rules §8 matrix order 6 before 8
cases.expected: BR-12 evaluated before BR-02 radius check; missing GPS yields GpsDisabled not OutOfRadius even when hypothetical coords would fail radius

cases.title: GpsDisabled evaluated after DuplicateCheckIn per pipeline step 10 then 11 ordering
preconditions: Student already has attendance status Present for the Active session
Valid unexpired QrToken available
Second check-in request omits coordinates (GPS disabled scenario)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in as same student with tokenId only (no coordinates)
Assert HTTP status 409 outcome DuplicateCheckIn (not GpsDisabled)
Assert errorCode DuplicateCheckIn per BR-04 pipeline step 10 precedence
Verify BR-12 step 11 not reached when duplicate detected at step 10
cases.expected: BR-12 applies only when prior pipeline steps pass; DuplicateCheckIn takes precedence over GpsDisabled for already-Present student

cases.title: Check-in pipeline evaluates GpsDisabled at step 11 before spoof at step 12 and radius at step 13
preconditions: CheckInService with injectable pipeline steps per validation-rules §5.1
Active session, enrolled student, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
Request missing coordinates; spoof and radius mocks instrumented
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submit with tokenId only (no latitude/longitude)
Assert outcome GpsDisabled
Assert spoof heuristics step was not reached (no SpoofSuspected outcome)
Assert GeoVerificationService.verifyLocation was not called
Verify short-circuit order: BR-12 before FR-10 spoof and BR-02 radius
cases.expected: BR-12 pipeline position step 11 per validation-rules §5.1; GpsDisabled short-circuits before spoof and radius checks

cases.title: Instructor denied POST /check-in without GPS payload (lacks checkin:submit before BR-12)
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session available
Active session with valid room GPS and QrToken
Instructor role lacks checkin:submit per roles-permissions §2.2
Request body with tokenId only (no coordinates)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId only using Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Verify no GpsDisabled or Present outcome created for instructor userId
Assert permission guard at Layer 3 runs before Layer 4 BR-12 domain check
cases.expected: BR-12 applies to Student mobile check-in only; Instructor cannot invoke check-in endpoint regardless of GPS availability

cases.title: GPS permission denied shows GpsDisabled panel with help link without API call within 15 s
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport 375×812 (iOS Safari or Android Chrome)
Active session check-in deep link /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 outcome Valid for enrolled student (BR-15 gate passed)
Playwright geolocation permission set to denied
Browser GPS disabled or location permission blocked
steps: Navigate to /check-in page on mobile viewport; wait for preflight 200 and GpsCaptureStep mount
Wait up to 15 seconds for geolocation timeout per validation-rules §6 client-side wait
Verify GpsDisabled outcome panel displays Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh
Verify Hướng dẫn cấp quyền or PermissionGuideModal link to device settings per AC-08c
Assert no POST /api/v1/check-in network request sent while GPS unavailable (client-side gate)
Verify submit control (Xác nhận điểm danh) remains disabled or shows GPS-required state
cases.expected: BR-12 client path: permission denied shows Vietnamese GpsDisabled message with permission help link; no server call until coordinates available per NFR-19

cases.title: GPS acquisition timeout after 15 seconds shows GpsDisabled UX without premature API submit
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport 375×812
Active session check-in deep link with valid token
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 outcome Valid (BR-15 gate passed)
Playwright geolocation mock configured to hang (no resolve within 15 s)
Test harness controls client geolocation timeout constant
steps: Navigate to /check-in page; wait for preflight pass then observe GpsCaptureStep loading state
Wait exactly 15 seconds without geolocation resolving
Verify GpsDisabled panel appears with message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh
Verify permission help link visible per user-flows §WF-03 GpsDisabled row
Assert network log shows zero POST /check-in requests during timeout window
cases.expected: BR-12 client timeout after configured 15-second wait triggers GpsDisabled UX without server round-trip

cases.title: Check-in form gates submit until GPS permission granted and coordinates captured
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport
Active session check-in deep link with valid token
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 outcome Valid per BR-15
Initial geolocation permission prompt state (not yet granted)
steps: Navigate to /check-in page; wait for preflight 200 and GpsCaptureStep mount
Verify GpsCaptureStep shows acquiring-location indicator
Verify submit button disabled or shows GPS-required badge before coordinates acquired
Grant geolocation permission with in-radius mock coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200)
Verify ready substate shows Vị trí đã sẵn sàng without spinner and aria-busy false per AC-08f
Verify submit control (Xác nhận điểm danh) becomes enabled after coordinates captured
Tap submit and verify success panel after server validates BR-02 and other rules
cases.expected: BR-12 UI gating after BR-15 preflight: submit blocked until geolocation available; AC-08f ready state then happy path proceeds after permission grant

cases.title: After granting GPS permission student retries check-in successfully from GpsDisabled state
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport with initial geolocation permission denied
Active session check-in deep link with valid token
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 outcome Valid (BR-15 gate passed)
GpsDisabled panel already displayed from prior denied state on GpsCaptureStep
steps: From GpsDisabled panel tap permission help link or retry control
Update Playwright geolocation permission to granted with in-radius coordinates
Tap retry or navigate refresh on check-in page
Verify GpsCaptureStep acquires coordinates and submit becomes enabled
Submit check-in and verify Present success confirmation
Verify no stale GpsDisabled message remains on screen
cases.expected: BR-12 recovery path: student enables GPS and retries; check-in succeeds when coordinates available and other rules pass

cases.title: Instructor manual attendance override is fallback when student GPS unavailable per BR-12 exception
preconditions: Active session with student attendance Pending after GpsDisabled check_in_attempt
Session Closed within 24 hours of closedAt
Assigned Instructor session with attendance:write permission
Student unable to obtain GPS (BR-12 blocks automated check-in)
steps: Verify student has CheckInAttempt outcome GpsDisabled and attendance status Pending
Instructor PATCH /api/v1/attendance/:recordId with status Present and note GPS unavailable — physical verification
Assert HTTP 200 and attendance status Present
Query attendance_audit_logs and assert editorId, previousStatus Pending, newStatus Present, and note captured
cases.expected: BR-12 exception: no automated check-in without GPS; instructor manual override to Present per BR-10 edit window is the documented fallback

cases.title: Schema validation rejects non-finite latitude before BR-12 GpsDisabled domain outcome
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session
Active session with Valid QrToken
Request sends latitude NaN or longitude Infinity (malformed numeric)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId, latitude: NaN, longitude: 106.660172 }
Assert HTTP status 400 or 422 with ValidationFailed or InvalidFormat at Layer 1 schema
Assert outcome is not GpsDisabled (schema failure precedes domain BR-12)
Contrast: omitting coordinates entirely yields GpsDisabled at Layer 4 step 11
cases.expected: BR-12 GpsDisabled applies to missing/unavailable GPS; malformed coordinate types fail schema validation at Layer 1 before domain pipeline

cases.title: Flow A step 4 requires GPS coordinates; missing coords block workshop check-in at BR-12
preconditions: Flow A steps 1–3 complete: roster seeded, session opened Active with room GPS, QR token polled
Authenticated enrolled Student session established
tokenId extracted from qrPayload returned in step 3
Simulated client with GPS permission denied (no coordinates to send)
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId only (no latitude/longitude) using Student session from Flow A
Assert HTTP 400 outcome GpsDisabled
Verify Flow A cannot proceed to step 5 Present count increment without valid GPS
Retry Flow A step 4 with in-radius coordinates and assert HTTP 200 Success to complete happy path
cases.expected: Flow A workshop check-in includes BR-12 GPS availability gate; GpsDisabled blocks lifecycle until coordinates supplied

cases.title: BR-15 preflight failure prevents GpsCaptureStep mount — GpsDisabled UX not shown before preflight pass
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport 375×812
Expired QrToken or GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns ExpiredQr
Browser geolocation permission denied (would trigger BR-12 client path if GPS step mounted)
steps: Navigate to /check-in with expired token deep link or scan expired QR
Assert GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns ExpiredQr outcome
Verify data-testid gps-capture-step is absent — GpsCaptureStep not mounted per BR-15
Verify ExpiredQr outcome panel on scan step with message Mã QR đã hết hạn — not GpsDisabled panel
Assert no geolocation permission prompt and no 15 s BR-12 client timeout cycle
Contrast: repeat with valid token, preflight 200, and denied geolocation — GpsDisabled panel appears per TC-BR-12-012
cases.expected: BR-15 gates GPS capture before BR-12: GpsDisabled UX applies only after preflight passes and GpsCaptureStep mounts; preflight failures remain on scan with ExpiredQr not GpsDisabled per user-flows §2 step 3b
